question: What is the full name of each car maker, along with its id and how many models it produces?
gold_sql: SELECT T1.FullName ,  T1.Id ,  count(*) FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Maker GROUP BY T1.Id;
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.col_3, T1.col_1, COUNT(*) FROM car_makers AS T1 JOIN model_list AS T2 ON T1.col_1 = T2.col_2 GROUP BY T1.col_1;
raw_response: SELECT T1.col_3, T1.col_1, COUNT(*) FROM car_makers AS T1 JOIN model_list AS T2 ON T1.col_1 = T2.col_2 GROUP BY T1.col_1;
